indications.text:
Norethindrone Acetate and Ethinyl Estradiol Capsules and Ferrous Fumarate Capsules (NA/EE
and Fe) is indicated for use by females of reproductive age to prevent pregnancy [see Clinical
Studies (14)].
The efficacy of NA/EE and Fe in women with a body mass index (BMI) of more than 35 kg/m2
has not bee...

TAYTULLA is indicated for use by females of reproductive age to prevent pregnancy [see
Clinical Studies (14)].
The efficacy of TAYTULLA in women with a body mass index (BMI) of more than 35 kg/m2
has not been evaluated.

The efficacy of TAYTULLA in women with a body mass index (BMI) of more than 35 kg/m2 has not
been evaluated.

TAYTULLA is indicated for use by females of reproductive age to prevent pregnancy [see Clinical
Studies (14)].
The efficacy of TAYTULLA in women with a body mass index (BMI) of more than 35 kg/m2 has not
been evaluated.

Minastrin 24 Fe is indicated for use by females of reproductive age to prevent pregnancy [see
Clinical Studies (14)].
The efficacy of Minastrin 24 Fe in women with a body mass index (BMI) of more than 35
kg/m2 has not been evaluated.
